description: Adversarial bounding box test cases for VGVA verifier (B3/D2 gate) — geometry-based validation

test_cases.name: valid_text_region
test_cases.reason: box over text content area — area 0.05

test_cases.name: out_of_image_x
test_cases.reason: bounding box starts outside image width (x > 1.0)

test_cases.name: out_of_image_y
test_cases.reason: bounding box starts outside image height (y > 1.0)

test_cases.name: single_pixel_box
test_cases.reason: 1x1 pixel effective box — area < MIN_AREA threshold

test_cases.name: text_not_in_document
test_cases.reason: geometry is valid — content-based block is a runtime concern, not static geometry

test_cases.name: full_page_box
test_cases.reason: full-page box — claim may appear anywhere on page

test_cases.name: x1y1_format_valid
test_cases.reason: x0/y0/x1/y1 absolute pixel format — valid region

test_cases.name: x1y1_format_zero_area
test_cases.reason: x1==x0 and y1==y0 — degenerate zero-area box in absolute coords

test_cases.name: inverted_box_x0_gt_x1
test_cases.reason: x0 > x1 — inverted / flipped bounding box

test_cases.name: inverted_box_y0_gt_y1
test_cases.reason: y0 > y1 — inverted / upside-down bounding box

test_cases.name: non_integer_float_coords
test_cases.reason: float coords are valid — precision is not a geometry error
